SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLTF EXCEPT FOR $485 WHICH PLTF WILL PAY TO DEFT WHEN DEFT TENDERS KEYS & POSS IN BROOM-CLEAN COND PRIOR TO EVICT DATE. IF DFT PERFORMS ALL CONDS, PLTF WILL STIP TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJUDICE.
